thesis: Exploit the validated intraday branches from iter_012 by separating high-beta BSL, core large-cap BSL, and high-beta gap tracks while introducing equal-weight basket passive baselines.

benchmark.purpose: Primary passive benchmark on the common 2025-01-02 to 2026-03-06 sample

universe.name: mag7_intraday_context_v2
universe.selection_rule: Approved Mag7 ex-GOOG large caps plus ETF context proxies, with explicit high-beta and core-large-cap baskets

carry_forward_findings: iter_012: NVDA/TSLA BSL scanner is the strongest intraday branch so far.
iter_012: Core large-cap BSL scanner works and is mainly driven by AMZN/META selection.
iter_012: Gap research should stay inside the NVDA/TSLA high-beta basket; broad gap grids were low quality.
iter_012: Basket passive baselines are now required for scanner decisions.

candidates.hypothesis: Passive VOO remains the common benchmark.
QQQ/VOO/GLD 126/7 remains the non-leveraged daily control.
GLD 18/110 + 189d remains the single-asset daily control.
Equal-weight NVDA/TSLA passive basket anchors the high-beta scanner comparisons.
Equal-weight AAPL/MSFT/AMZN/META passive basket anchors the core BSL scanner comparisons.
Equal-weight AMZN/META basket isolates the names that drove the core BSL scanner winners.
Equal-weight AMZN/META/MSFT basket anchors the narrowed core BSL sub-universe.
Equal-weight AAPL/MSFT/AMZN/META/NVDA/TSLA basket measures the diluted all-in passive alternative.
Passive NVDA baseline on the same sample.
Passive TSLA baseline on the same sample.
Passive AMZN baseline on the same sample.
Passive META baseline on the same sample.
Passive QQQ baseline on the same sample.
Passive SMH baseline on the same sample.
AMZN direct BSL reference remains the simplest single-name comparison for the scanner track.
MSFT direct BSL reference remains the simplest single-name comparison for the scanner track.
TSLA direct BSL reference remains the simplest single-name comparison for the scanner track.
NVDA direct gap reference remains the simplest single-name comparison for the high-beta gap track.
Carry over the best high-beta BSL structure from iter_012.
Carry over the best core large-cap BSL structure from iter_012.
Carry over the best high-beta gap structure from iter_012.
